project.title: Skyfall Mage2
project.description: A personal non-commercial game prototype exploring browser-first action RPG systems and WebGPU material simulation experiments.

posts.title: Noita-Style WebGPU Material Field Test
posts.text: A WebGPU compute/render prototype for Noita-inspired material effects: sand, water, fire, smoke, sparks, and small explosion interactions running directly in the browser.

media.title: Skyfall Mage2 Noita-style WebGPU material field test
